decision.rationale: A bounded recovery probe confirmed recent Form 144 rows and EDGAR acceptance timestamps in SEC submissions metadata for large issuers, and archive primary documents were reachable. However, no durable timestamp-safe Form 144 parser/event table with conservative issuer mapping, duplicate/amendment clustering, breadth/concentration gates, or real-data evaluator was built after the prior timeout. Rejected at source/event-table gate; no performance evaluation was run.

data.source: SEC EDGAR submissions metadata and public Form 144 archive documents

bounded_probe.notes: The xsl144X01/primary_doc.xml URLs returned SEC-rendered XHTML for the sampled filings; the complete-submission .txt contained embedded Form 144 XML-like fields for one sample. This was a reachability probe only, not a durable parser.

candidate_pool.description: Potentially all public SEC Form 144/144-A filings with EDGAR acceptance timestamps, proposed-sale fields, issuer/filer/broker metadata, and conservative mapping to liquid U.S. common stocks.

failed_components: no durable Form 144 XML/text parser was implemented after prior timeout
no reproducible timestamp-safe parsed event table was retained
conservative issuer-to-liquid-common-stock mapping was not built
breadth and issuer/filer/broker/sector/year concentration gates were not evaluated
real-data performance evaluator and controls were not run
source_gate.reason: The issue falsifier requires a reproducible timestamp-safe Form 144 event table with parsed proposed-sale fields, conservative issuer mapping, clustering, breadth/concentration gates, and real-data performance evaluation. The bounded recovery found source reachability but did not produce those durable components.

performance_run.reason: Source/event-table gate failed; no returns, event windows, controls, costs, random periods, shifted/shuffled labels, daemon, or orders were evaluated.

limitations: The probe was intentionally bounded and did not retain raw SEC filings or raw parsed event rows.
Current SEC submissions recent metadata is issuer-centric and may omit older filing history without additional index crawling, which was out of scope for recovery.
Rendered Form 144 primary documents and complete-submission text require a robust parser before any timestamp-safe event claims.
No qfa/market daily bars were requested because no valid mapped event universe was produced.
No Form 4, generic filing-day, momentum/reversal, sector/beta, price/volume, size/liquidity, shifted-label, shuffled-size, or matched non-event controls were run.
status_rationale: Rejected for this research cycle at source/event-table gate with a disabled zero-weight model. No direct Form 144 refinement child should be created.
